Follow the instruction exactly.","role":"system"},{"content":"What is the weather in Paris?","role":"user"},{"role":"assistant","tool_calls":[{"function":{"arguments":"{\"city\":\"Paris\"}","name":"get_weather"},"id":"call_jig_subject_1","type":"function"}]},{"content":"sunny, 24C","role":"tool","tool_call_id":"call_jig_subject_1"},{"content":"Now tell me the weather in one short sentence.","role":"user"}],"model":"deepseek-v4-flash","stream":true,"stream_options":{"include_usage":true},"tools":[{"function":{"description":"Get the current weather for a city","name":"get_weather","parameters":{"properties":{"city":{"type":"string"}},"required":["city"],"type":"object"}},"type":"function"}]}
